creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
Created attachment 243796
git format-patch, sysutils/toybox 0.8.10

Changelog: http://landley.net/toybox/#30-07-2023
- Several bug fixes and feature enhancements, see URL for details
- New command: shuf

Port changes:
- Enable the new shuf toy (not enabled by default upstream)

QA:
poudriere testport ok on:
- 13.2 amd64
- 13.2 arm64.aarch64
- 14-C arm64.aarch64
- 12.4 amd64
- 12.4 i386
